title: Realtor.com Lead
description: Schema representing a real estate lead delivered from Realtor.com to a CRM system via the Connections Plus or Lead Delivery API. Captures buyer and seller lead contact information, associated property details, financial qualification data, and transaction likelihood scores.

lead_id.description: Unique identifier for the lead assigned by Realtor.com.

role.description: Role of the lead indicating whether they are a buyer or seller.

source.description: Source of the lead on Realtor.com such as listing page, search results, or recommendation.

message.description: Optional message from the consumer expressing their interest or asking questions.

is_likely_to_transact.description: Indicator of whether the lead is likely to complete a real estate transaction.

probability_to_transact.description: Probability score from 0 to 1 indicating how likely the lead is to complete a transaction.

timestamp.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when the lead was generated.

digital_signature.description: Optional digital signature for verifying the authenticity and integrity of the lead data.

Property.description: Property information associated with the lead.

listing_url.description: URL of the property listing on Realtor.com.

address.description: Full street address of the property.

city.description: City where the property is located.

zip_code.description: Five-digit ZIP code of the property.

mls_name.description: Name of the MLS that holds the listing.

active_days_on_market.description: Number of days the property has been actively listed.

FinanceInfo.description: Financial qualification information provided by the buyer.

pre_approved.description: Whether the buyer is pre-approved for a mortgage.

financing_type.description: Type of financing intended such as conventional, FHA, VA, or cash.

ListingAgent.description: Listing agent contact information associated with the property.

name.description: Full name of the listing agent.

email.description: Email address of the listing agent.

phone.description: Phone number of the listing agent.
